endToEndId.description: Unique identifier assigned by Creditor to identify Payment Request in their system.

instructionId.description: Unique identifier for the transaction assigned by the transaction initiator (CSP).

paymentRequestType.description: Set by the Creditor/CSP to define the settlement type of the Payment Request. * Refer to Codes and Formats section for more details.

transactionCreationDateTime.description: ISO 8601 format date and time in Coordinated Universal Time (UTC) the Payment Request was created.

instructedAmount.description: The total amount of the payment request, as specified by the Creditor.

purpose.description: Set by Creditor/CSP to indicate the Payment Request type. * Refer to Codes and Formats section for more details.

categoryPurpose.description: Set by the Creditor/CSP to offer specific transaction processing. * Refer to Codes and Formats section for more details.

restriction.description: Set by the Creditor/CSP to communicate any restrictions to be verified by DSP before payment authorization. * Refer to Codes and Formats section for more details.

creditAccountAllowed.description: Indicator to specify Credit account can be used for the payment.

strongCustomerAuthentication.description: Indicates a request from Creditor to DSP to step-up authentication for the transaction.
